title: How PMOs can master complex projects with monday.com (Elevate 2022 takeway)
excerpt: As part of Elevate 2022, Senior Implementation Consultant Jasmine Hendricks discussed all things monday.com for Project Management. From explaining her favorite PMO features to reviewing an in-depth use case using monday…

posts.author: noy_s (Noy )
posts.cookedHtml:
As part of Elevate 2022, Senior Implementation Consultant Jasmine Hendricks discussed all things monday.com for Project Management. From explaining her favorite PMO features to reviewing an in-depth use case using monday projects, Jasmine shed light on how monday.com can be used as a powerful and robust project management software.

Two project management features that Jasmine is particularly excited about are:

  • Gantt baseline which takes a snapshot of your project 's timeline and tracks the the variance for you if the timeline changes
  • Critical path which instantly allows you to see the longest duration of tasks throughout your project

Not only this, but Jasmine also walked us a through an Enterprise-level project management use case complete multiple boards, automatically generated project templates, Gantt charts, forms for project request submissions, resource allocation charts, automations, dependencies, and much much more!

Want to learn more about monday projects? Check out our Knowledge Base articles all about it below!

  • Get started with monday projects
  • monday projects for Enterprise

To watch the full video from Elevate, check out this link, scroll down and click on “Watch VOD” under the “How PMO’s can master complex projects with monday.com” section:

image2370×360 154 KB

Do you have any other monday.com features that you love to use to manage your projects? Let us know below!
